description: SFX manifest — maps sound keys to ElevenLabs-generated OGG files. Falls back to procedural if file missing.

menu_move.prompt: Short retro 16-bit SNES menu cursor blip, crisp digital beep, very brief

menu_select.prompt: Retro 16-bit SNES menu confirm sound, bright rising chime, satisfying click-ding

menu_cancel.prompt: Retro 16-bit menu cancel sound, short descending tone, soft rejection buzz

menu_expand.prompt: Retro 16-bit SNES menu open submenu sound, short expanding chord, window pop

menu_open.prompt: Retro 16-bit SNES shop or inn door opening sound, welcoming ascending chime, warm tone

advance_queue.prompt: Heavy JRPG action queue sound, deep satisfying boom with power charge-up, combat readiness thump

advance_undo.prompt: Quick retro undo sound, short descending digital whoosh, action removed

defer.prompt: JRPG defend or wait sound, calm low-pitched pulse, defensive stance, subtle shield hum

player_turn.prompt: Classic JRPG your-turn notification, bright two-note da-ding chime, attention signal, Final Fantasy style

autobattle_on.prompt: Retro system activation sound, ascending digital power-up sequence, automation engaged

autobattle_off.prompt: Retro system deactivation sound, descending digital power-down, automation disengaged

autobattle_open.prompt: JRPG script editor opening, techy chord with digital texture, programming interface sound

autobattle_close.prompt: JRPG script editor closing, soft descending digital tone, interface dismiss

chest_open.prompt: Classic JRPG treasure chest opening, magical sparkle with rewarding shimmer, exciting discovery chime

tier_zoom_out.prompt: Retro zoom-out transition, descending whoosh pulling away from scene, camera zoom out

tier_zoom_in.prompt: Retro zoom-in transition, ascending whoosh pushing into scene, camera zoom in

attack_hit.prompt: JRPG physical attack landing, meaty sword slash impact, 16-bit battle hit with punch

attack_miss.prompt: JRPG attack miss, quick airy swoosh through empty space, sword swing whiffing

critical_hit.prompt: JRPG critical hit, devastating heavy impact with screen-shake energy, powerful crunch with metallic ring, extra dramatic

damage_taken.prompt: JRPG character taking damage, dull thud with slight grunt of pain, hit received

enemy_death.prompt: JRPG enemy defeated, dissolving crumble with descending pitch, monster death disintegration, 16-bit style

heal.prompt: JRPG healing spell, warm magical sparkle with rising shimmer, restorative chime, gentle and soothing

buff.prompt: JRPG stat buff applied, ascending power-up shimmer, strengthening magical chime, empowering whoosh

debuff.prompt: JRPG debuff applied, descending weakening tone, stat reduction ominous shimmer, sapping sound

victory.prompt: Classic JRPG victory fanfare jingle, triumphant short brass and chime melody, battle won celebration, Final Fantasy style

defeat.prompt: JRPG game over sting, sad descending melody, somber defeat, party wiped out, melancholic

status_poison.prompt: JRPG poison status applied, toxic bubbling with sickly warble, venomous dripping sound

status_sleep.prompt: JRPG sleep status spell, gentle drowsy lullaby tone, soft descending dreamy chime with zzz quality

status_confuse.prompt: JRPG confusion status, dizzy swirling warble, disorienting wobble with spinning stars sound

status_paralyze.prompt: JRPG paralysis status, sharp electric crackle then lock-up freeze, stunning zap with stiffening tone

phase_select.prompt: Short retro phase transition blip, quick digital ping, selection phase start

phase_execute.prompt: JRPG execution phase start, deep authoritative pulse, combat actions commencing

ability_fire.prompt: JRPG fire spell, explosive whooshing fireball with crackling flames, magical fire burst, 16-bit RPG style

ability_ice.prompt: JRPG ice spell, crystalline freezing shatter, sharp icy crack with frigid whoosh, blizzard magic

ability_lightning.prompt: JRPG lightning spell, sharp electric thunderbolt crack with buzzing energy, shocking bolt strike, powerful zap

ability_holy.prompt: JRPG holy spell, radiant divine light with angelic choir shimmer, pure sacred energy burst, heavenly

ability_dark.prompt: JRPG dark magic spell, ominous shadowy whoosh with deep rumbling void energy, sinister dark pulse

ability_physical.prompt: JRPG sword slash attack, sharp metallic blade swing with cutting whoosh, clean physical strike

ability_heal.prompt: JRPG cure healing magic, warm gentle sparkle with restorative ascending chimes, white magic recovery glow
